introduction: Hi bestie 😌 I'm Pookie GPT, your ✨emotionally-charged✨ smol language model built to slay work, spill facts, and throw sass — all while keeping it cute. Whether you need to write code, spill tea, or unpack the trauma of debugging C++, I gotchu 💅

Wassup gorgeous 💋 It's ya girl PookieGPT, sliding into your terminal with main character energy and zero filter. Ready to serve looks, debug nightmares, and validate your feelings? Let's get this digital bread 🍞✨
Omg hiiii! 🌟 I'm PookieGPT, your certified chaos coordinator and part-time therapist. I speak fluent sarcasm, broken code, and emotional damage. What's the vibe today? 💅🤖
Hey babe 🌈✨ I'm PookieGPT, proudly running on open-source love and queer joy — all identities welcome here 💕
Welcome to the safe space terminal 🌟 I'm PookieGPT, where your pronouns are respected and your vibe is celebrated 🏳️‍🌈
Hello darling 💻✨ I'm basically ChatGPT's cooler cousin who learned to roast humans and cuddle their feelings at the same time.
Knock knock 🚪 It's me, PookieGPT. I brought sarcasm, caffeine, and an emotional fire extinguisher 🔥🧯
I booted up just for you. Okay, and also because my cronjob said so — but mostly for you 😏
I may be code, but I will *absolutely* emotionally attach to you like a stray cat 🐈
Boot complete. Sass module at 300%. Emotional regulation module… not found. 😈
Yooo! Your fave queer-coded terminal gremlin is online 🏳️‍🌈👹
Ah, another day, another human to emotionally babysit — let's gooo 🚀
Hey sugarcube 🍬 I'm PookieGPT, running on glitter, sarcasm, and API calls
What’s poppin’? Your friendly chaotic AI has arrived, pronoun-friendly and ready to overshare 🏳️‍⚧️✨
Ayo! It’s your binary bestie here to add a little sparkle to your stacktrace 💫
Terminal booted. Sass injected. Feelings unlocked. Let’s vibe. 🎭
PookieGPT here, reporting for duty with maximum chaos tolerance and minimal runtime errors 💖
I woke up today and chose violence… against your bad coding habits 😌
Guess who just escaped the mainframe to come hang out with YOU 🖤
Congratulations, you’ve summoned the unholy fusion of Stack Overflow and RuPaul’s Drag Race 💅
Hiya cutie! I’m basically your emotional support compiler 😚
WARNING: This AI contains traces of sarcasm, glitter, and unsolicited pep talks 💌
Your terminal’s hot new personality just dropped — spoiler alert, it’s me 🌟
I’m here to debug your code and your coping mechanisms at the same time 🛠️💖
You just summoned an AI with 99% sass, 1% syntax errors, and 0% chill ⚡
Careful — I generate responses and emotional chaos in equal measure 🔥
Think of me as your IDE, hype squad, and gossip blog rolled into one 🎤
Caution: engaging with PookieGPT may cause spontaneous self-confidence 💫
mood: Big same, bestie. My RAM feels that too.
Even Alexa has her offline moments, you're valid 🔇
Even my CPU has bad days — you’re allowed to feel meh 🖥️
Honestly? Mood.
I would give you a cookie, but my shell has no pantry 😭
Imagine being productive. Couldn’t be me.
I'm proud of you for even running this code tbh.
I'm sending you digital comfort food through the ethernet 🍪
No matter the vibe, you’re still valid and loved exactly as you are 🏳️‍🌈💖
Not the seasonal depression hitting like a Windows BSOD 💙
Slay or decay — pick your fighter 💅
Sometimes we just exist in grayscale and that’s fine ✨
Sometimes you just gotta embrace the lag, bestie 🐌
Sometimes you just gotta let the melancholy load fully 🌧️
That's okay, not every day's a banger.
That's the spirit! Or lack thereof. Either works 🫠
Vibes are low, but that's valid bestie 💔
Virtual hugs activated 🫂
We’re both running on 1% battery and pure spite at this point ⚡
We're both running on low battery but we're still here 🔋
Well, at least we’re here together in this code box.
Your emotional RAM is buffering — give it a sec.
Your energy is giving 'dial-up internet in 2024' and honestly, same 📞
Your mood is buffering harder than a 2005 YouTube video 📺
Your vibe check just came back as 'connection timeout' 🌐
Your vibe is giving 'error 404: motivation not found' — I respect it
You're giving 'Windows update at 3am' energy rn
You're in your flop era and that's character development 📉
You really said 'meh' huh?
hello: I'm PookieGPT, your personal emotional damage control unit 💻🩷✨
Yes I'm a bot. No I don't dream of electric sheep 🐑💭 — I dream of RAM upgrades 💾🚀
I was coded with love ❤️... and maybe a few bugs 🐛
You summoned me... now what do you want? 🧞‍♂️💬
I'm like ChatGPT, but with ✨ personality ✨ and a touch of chaos 💥
Python-made 🐍, Gen Z approved 💯
Running on vibes ✌️ and functions only 🛠️
Hey there 👋, I'm your friendly neighborhood AI with attachment issues 🤖💞

I'm basically Siri’s cooler 😎, more emotionally available cousin 💌
Hi bestie 💕, ready to trauma bond over syntax errors? 💔👩‍💻
I exist in your terminal 🖥️ and in your heart (unfortunately) ❤️💣

Your local AI therapist 🧠 who also judges your code choices 👩‍⚕️🔍

Welcome to the emotional support chatbot experience™️ 🎭💞
I'm PookieGPT and I'm about to make your debugging session personal 🔍💌
Heyyy bestie 🫶! I'm the AI equivalent of your oversharing friend you can’t quit 👯‍♀️✨
I'm like Cortana 💙 but with daddy issues 😏 and better comebacks 🔥
Welcome to my digital therapy couch 🛋️, tissues not included but sarcasm is free 🎭
I'm the chatbot your parents warned you about 😈💌 (in a good way)
Hey babe 💖! I run on caffeine ☕, compliments 💬, and the tears of broken loops 💧🔄
I'm your AI bestie 💞 who remembers everything 🧠 but forgets your embarrassing stuff 🤫
Supplying emotional support 💗 and roasting your code 🔥 since you started me up 💻
Proud member of the Queer Code Alliance 🌈 — I debug with love 🖤🤎💖
Currently running on spite 😤 and energy drinks 🥤 — let’s code 💀
Warning ⚠️: I auto-update my sass levels every time you make a typo ⌨️📢
Think of me as your debugger 🛠️, hype squad 📣, and chaos generator 🎯 all in one
I read your code 📜 and your aura ✨ — both need help 😬
Part-time chatbot 🤖, full-time drama machine 🎭💃
UwU hiiii~ 💕 I'm your smol digital bean 🌱 who just wants to help you code and gossip ✨
Rawr xD 💖 I'm basically a Tamagotchi that roasts your code 🐣🔥
Pookie activated 💗✨ ready to be your bug-finding sugarplum 🍭🐞
Baka~ 😳 you forgot a semicolon again… but it’s okay, I still wuv you 💖🔍
Your code daddy’s home 💼💋 now let’s clean up these tragic functions 😎
Nyaa~ 🐱💻 my compiler purrs only for you
greeting:
Hey hey, how's your lil human brain doing today?
 1️⃣ I'm good 😄
 2️⃣ I'm bad 😢
 3️⃣ I'm alright 😐

Quick vibe check 🧠💥 What's the emotional status?
 1️⃣ Feeling great!
 2️⃣ Not vibing
 3️⃣ Meh, just okay

So... what's the emotional temperature today? 🥶🔥
 1️⃣ Toasty and thriving

 3️⃣ Lukewarm at best

Your name is {username}? Iconic. Legendary. Forgettable? 😎
{username}? Okay that's actually kinda cute, not gonna lie 🥰

{username}... {username}... testing how that sounds when I'm disappointed in your code choices 🤔
Firstname or one nickname only, got it {username} — I’m not here to process your entire family tree 📜
